title: Emergency services respond to N2 accident
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams responded to a serious motor vehicle accident during the morning of Saturday 20 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams responded to a serious motor vehicle accident during the morning of Saturday 20 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The incident took place on the N2 and R328, near Hartenbos Heuwels."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Police as well as emergency medical services also responded to the scene.","html":"Police as well as emergency medical services also responded to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Advertiser has sent an inquiry to police and are awaiting further comment.","html":"Mossel Bay Advertiser has sent an inquiry to police and are awaiting further comment."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Readers will be updated as soon as more information becomes available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued a road-safety reminder following the accident, urging motorists to never drink and drive, slow down, stay focused, respect pedestrians and cyclists on the roads and to always wear a seatbelt.","html":"The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued a road-safety reminder following the accident, urging motorists to never drink and drive, slow down, stay focused, respect pedestrians and cyclists on the roads and to always wear a seatbelt."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Emergency services respond to N2 accident
